violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

(Packages of cheese) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
Inspector observed a bag of cheese being stored on top of onions in cookline prep unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

The floors, walls, ceilings and stove vents throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue,food debris, and/or dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back kitchen and outside ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
Inspector observed a dead insects on a hanging fly glue trap.PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
Inspector observed towels being used to cover tortillas. PIC informed and removed towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
Door located in the front entrance area was not in good repair. Observed cracked glass. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
